hero.title: Hi, I’m Dival Sehgal
hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer — I build fast, scalable interfaces with Next.js, React, TypeScript and custom design systems.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I’m a frontend engineer who loves building clean, performant UIs with React, Next.js, and TypeScript.
I enjoy creating scalable design systems, working on large-scale architectures, and building tools that improve developer workflows.

description.text: Built and optimized large-scale Next.js applications with highly efficient polling systems for real-time updates.
Created scalable design systems and reusable UI component libraries following atomic design patterns.
Developed modular frontend architectures improving maintainability across multiple teams.
Integrated complex backend services with efficient API handling and caching strategies.
Delivered custom dashboards, marketing sites, and small-scale SaaS MVPs for multiple clients.
Improved site performance scores to 90+ Lighthouse across all client projects.
Built UI components and pages for early-stage B2B dashboards and SaaS tools.
Collaborated directly with founders and engineers on rapid iteration cycles.

projects.name: Next.js Portfolio
projects.description: My personal portfolio + blog built with a custom SCSS design system, token generator, and MUI integration.
